title: Galaxy Generator
description: Procedural galaxy renderer using the Megaparsecs ring-loop technique — overlapping rotated elliptical orbits with Keplerian motion. 3×3 grid cycles through 5 Hubble morphology types (spiral, barred spiral, elliptical, lenticular, irregular) every 7 seconds. Based on BigWings' Megaparsecs, CC BY-NC-SA 3.0.
